Title: FDA Medical Device Databases
Notes: Primary source for all FDA device regulatory status

Title: FDA 510(k) Premarket Notification Database
Notes: Search by K-number, device name, or manufacturer

Title: FDA PMA Database
Notes: Search by PMA number, device name, or manufacturer

Title: FDA De Novo Classification Database
Notes: Used for BrainsWay OCD De Novo DEN170078

Title: FDA HDE Database
Notes: Used for Medtronic DBS OCD (H050003) and dystonia (H020007)

Title: EUDAMED / EU Medical Devices Overview
Use_Case: EU device registration and public information
Notes: Public availability and completeness may vary

Title: CANMAT 2023 Depression Guidelines Update
Notes: Includes TMS, iTBS as recommended neuromodulation options

Title: European IFCN Guidelines for Therapeutic tDCS/rTMS (Lefaucheur et al.)
Use_Case: Evidence-based guidelines for noninvasive brain stimulation
Notes: Level A/B recommendations for specific condition-modality pairs

Title: THREE-D Trial: iTBS vs 10 Hz rTMS for Depression (Blumberger et al., Lancet)
Notes: n=388; iTBS non-inferior to 10 Hz; basis for iTBS adoption

Title: Neurofeedback ADHD Meta-Analysis (Cortese et al., JAMA Psychiatry 2024)
Notes: 38 RCTs, n=2472; probably-blinded SMD=0.04 (not significant). Critical evidence caution.

Title: tDCS for Depression Meta-Analysis 2024 (Nature)
Notes: 32 studies; SMD=-0.355 overall; 2 mA > 1 mA

Title: CES for Anxiety Meta-Analysis 2022
Notes: 11 RCTs, n=794; g=-0.625; Alpha-Stim: ES=-1.05

Title: taVNS for Depression Meta-Analysis 2023
Notes: 12 studies, n=838; GRADE: low to very low quality

Title: rTMS for PTSD Meta-Analysis 2025
Notes: 15 studies, n=760; SMD=1.29; dose-response relationship

Title: rTMS for Stroke Motor Recovery 2024
Notes: Low-RoB RCTs; significant FMA-UE improvement

Title: rTMS for Tinnitus 2025
Notes: 16 RCTs, n=1105; positive short-term, NOT durable at 6 months

Title: VNS for Epilepsy Meta-Analysis
Notes: OR 2.27 for ≥50% seizure reduction

Title: SANTE Trial (ANT-DBS for Epilepsy)
Notes: n=110; 68% responder rate at 5 years

Title: rTMS for Parkinson's Disease (JAMA Neurology 2015)
Notes: 27 RCTs; significant motor improvement; dose-response

Title: Home-Based tDCS for Chronic Pain 2024
Notes: 11 RCTs; SMD=-0.95; fibromyalgia and knee OA responded

Title: TMS Safety Guidelines (Rossi et al. 2009/2020)
Notes: Basis for TMS contraindication screening worldwide

Title: BrainsWay OCD De Novo Clearance (DEN170078)
Notes: De Novo authorization Aug 2018

Title: Flow FL-100 PMA Approval (P230024)
Use_Case: First and only tDCS PMA approval
Notes: Approved Dec 8, 2025 for moderate-severe MDD

Title: BRIGhTMIND Trial (Nature Medicine 2023)
Notes: cgiTBS more efficacious at 26 weeks in TRD

Title: ADAPT-PD Adaptive DBS FDA Approval
Notes: Medtronic BrainSense aDBS; Feb 2025

Title: Neurofeedback ADHD Cortese 2016
Notes: 13 trials, n=520; effects not significant with probably-blinded outcomes

Title: CES Insomnia Critical Review
Notes: About half of high-quality studies show improvement

Title: rTMS for OCD (SMA 1 Hz)
Notes: Double-blind RCT; significant Y-BOCS decrease

Title: gammaCore FDA De Novo (DEN150048)
Notes: FDA SSED for episodic cluster headache

Title: JAMA tES for Depression 2025
Notes: tDCS + medication superior to monotherapy
